summary: Social Live System Fixes Testing - All features verified. (1) LiveStreamViewer Auth Bug Fix: 5-second timeout with 'Stream Unavailable' fallback, 'Back to Feed' button, NO session invalidation on stream errors - VERIFIED via code review. (2) Smart Emoji Picker: Smile icon button opens picker with surf-first categories, 8 quick access emojis (🤙🌊🏄🔥💯🙌❤️👏), emoji insertion into comment input - VERIFIED via Playwright. (3) Condition Report Multi-Post: API returns story_id, post_id, condition_report_id - VERIFIED via pytest (8/8 tests passed).

minor.issue: Returns 404 - endpoint may not exist or be deprecated (non-blocking)

critical_code_review_comments: LiveStreamViewer.js: StreamUnavailable component with 'Back to Feed' button - VERIFIED (lines 128-149)
LiveStreamViewer.js: No auth invalidation on stream errors - handleBackToFeed just calls onClose() - VERIFIED (lines 300-309)
LiveStreamViewer.js: handleError and handleDisconnected do NOT modify auth state - VERIFIED (lines 324-341)
EmojiPicker.js: CommentInputWithEmoji component with emoji button (Smile icon) - VERIFIED (lines 139-229)
Feed.js: Uses CommentInputWithEmoji for all post comments - VERIFIED (lines 1161-1170)
condition_reports.py: Multi-post handshake creates Story, Post, ConditionReport - VERIFIED (lines 280-306)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Social Live fixes verified: (1) LiveStreamViewer has 5-second timeout with 'Stream Unavailable' fallback and 'Back to Feed' button - does NOT kick user to login on stream errors. (2) Emoji picker works in comment inputs - click smile icon to open, 8 quick access surf emojis, surf-first categories. (3) Condition report multi-post creates story, post, and condition_report simultaneously.

features_verified.livestream_viewer_fallback: VERIFIED - StreamUnavailable component with WifiOff icon and 'Stream Unavailable' message
features_verified.livestream_viewer_back_to_feed: VERIFIED - 'Back to Feed' button calls onClose() without auth invalidation
features_verified.livestream_viewer_no_auth_kick: VERIFIED - handleError and handleDisconnected do NOT modify auth state
features_verified.emoji_picker_button: VERIFIED - Smile icon button in comment input (data-testid='emoji-btn-{postId}')
features_verified.emoji_picker_opens: VERIFIED - Clicking button opens emoji picker (data-testid='emoji-picker')
features_verified.emoji_picker_categories: VERIFIED - Surf & Ocean, Reactions, Faces, Gestures, Nature, Weather
features_verified.emoji_insertion: VERIFIED - Clicking emoji inserts into comment input
features_verified.condition_report_multi_post: VERIFIED - API returns story_id, post_id, condition_report_id
